title: Firewood (Holm oak and white oak)
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is FRANCE INRAE. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 21 FR. Forest represent half of the Corsican land (400 000 ha), which is bigger than the national average (30%). Half of it corresponds to forests of mid-altitude. They are owned by individuals, under small parcels that are generally smaller than 10ha. They are mostly composed of oaks and they have been expanding at an important rate. This corresponds to the finished form of shrub, once it has grown on abandoned land. It has a role for heating local households, eventhough it is not optimized. 280 establishments are involved in the wood sector in Corsica, mostly in extracting firwood, but the profesionnals are aging and salaries are less than national average.
